# SMART Sports — FY26 Fundraising Dashboard

> Fundraising command center for SMART Sports: revenue goals, grant pipeline, donor CRM, golf invitational, and program funding.

SMART Sports Compass is a web-based dashboard for nonprofit fundraising management, helping teams track FY26 revenue, grants, donors, sponsors, and events in one place.

## Pages

- [Sign In](/auth): Secure sign in to the fundraising dashboard.
